production_note: agentic_I1 dual-LLM packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: range(3) produce 0,1,2; list(range(3)) materializa [0,1,2] como en theory de iteración.
Explorer: for sobre lista de dicts imprime cada id de registro de intake sintético.

exercises.code:
# range vs lista materializada
print("range lazy:", range(1_000_000))
print("list materializa:", list(range(5)))
print("usa range en for sin list() si solo necesitas iterar")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: range es lazy; list() materializa — para n grande preferir for range sin list.
Explorer: enumerate(start=1) numera filas humanas del gate de intake.

exercises.code:
nombres = ["Ana", "Luis", "María"]
edades = [30, 25, 40]
for n, e in zip(nombres, edades):
    print(f"{n}={e}")
print("zip corto:", list(zip(nombres, edades[:1])))
print("sin strict se pierde Luis/María en silencio")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: zip empareja nombres/edades; sin strict el 3º se pierde en silencio.
Explorer: zip_strict lanza ValueError si longitudes difieren, pedagogía de zip(..., strict=True).

exercises.code:
lines = ["r1", "r2", "", "r3"]
i = 0
out = []
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    i += 1
    if line == "":
        break
    out.append(line)
print(out)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: while con break en string vacío acumula r1,r2 sin r3.

exercises.code:
intentos = 0
MAX = 3
while intentos < MAX:
    intentos += 1
    print(f"intento {intentos}")
print("done", intentos)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: reintentos while intentos<MAX con incremento; done e intentos final 3.

exercises.code:
cola = ["job1", "job2", "job3"]
while cola:
    job = cola.pop(0)
    print(job)
    if job == "job2":
        print("PAUSE")
        break
print("restante", cola)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: cola pop(0) hasta job2 con PAUSE y restante [job3].
Explorer: continue si not strip filtra blancos; Lima y Cusco válidos.

exercises.code:
codes = [200, 200, 500, 200]
n_ok = 0
for c in codes:
    if c >= 500:
        print("STOP")
        break
    print("ok")
    n_ok += 1
print("n_ok", n_ok)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: break en code>=500 imprime STOP; n_ok=2 sin procesar el 200 final.

exercises.code:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    item = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if item == "END":
        break
    out.append(item)
print(out)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: while True con break en END y guardrail i>10; out=['a','b'].
Explorer: contadores n_accept/n_reject/n_total sobre statuses del gate.

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

print(round(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]), 4))
print(tasa_reject([]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: tasa_reject con guard n_total==0 → None evita ZeroDivisionError.
Explorer: primer status review con enumerate; imprime índice e id C2.

exercises.code:
nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print([x * x for x in nums])
print([x for x in nums if x % 2 == 0])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: comprehensions de cuadrados y pares sobre nums 1..5.

exercises.code:
rows = [{"status": "reject"}, {"status": "accept"}, {"status": "reject"}, {"status": "review"}]
print(sorted({r["status"] for r in rows}))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: set comprehension de statuses + sorted para reporte.

exercises.code:
rows = [{"id": "C1", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "C2", "status": "reject"}, {"id": "C3", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "C4", "status": "reject"}]
by = {r["id"]: r["status"] for r in rows}
rejects = [i for i, st in by.items() if st == "reject"]
tasa = len(rejects) / len(rows)
print(by["C2"], rejects, tasa)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: dict id→status y tasa reject 0.5 con lista de rejects por comprehension.
Explorer: traza i,val,s sumando solo positivos; s final 5.

exercises.code:
filas = ["a", "b", "c"]
n = 0
for f in filas:
    n += 1  # un solo incremento por fila (bug era n+=1 dos veces)
print(n)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: un solo n+=1 por fila corrige el doble incremento; n=3.
Explorer: TRACE por registro con dict(counts) muestra crecimiento del contador.
Explorer: n vs n*n → 5 y 25 como complejidad lineal vs cuadrática del packet.

exercises.code:
data = ["r0", "r1", "r2"]
for i in range(len(data)):  # índices 0..n-1
    print(data[i])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: range(len(data)) corrige off-by-one IndexError de range(1,len+1).

exercises.code:
sts = ["reject", "accept", "reject", "reject", "accept"]
n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
print("n_reject", n_reject)
print("O(n) basta: la tasa de error usa conteo lineal, no pares O(n^2)")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer: conteo O(n) de rejects basta para tasa; no hace falta O(n²) de pares.

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: list(range(3)) produce [0,1,2]; range empieza en 0 y excluye el tope, como en theory S04-T1.
zip sin strict se detiene en la secuencia más corta; el 3 se pierde en silencio sin ValueError.
La tasa de reject del gate usa n_total de registros procesados como denominador, no solo accept.
continue salta al siguiente ciclo del for sin terminar el programa ni borrar la lista.
Doble for anidado sobre n es O(n²) aproximadamente; el packet contrasta con el conteo lineal O(n).
